metadata.title: 공통 문법 마스터 과정 (앱 내 편집 가능)
metadata.description: 선생님이 규칙(rule)을 수정하면 일괄적으로 문장 풀에서 실시간 재추출할 수 있도록 설계된 유동적 데이터 번들링 데이터입니다.

sentences.english: What he said at the meeting was very important.
sentences.korean: 그가 회의에서 말한 것은 매우 중요했다.

sentences.english: Thanks to Antonio, the islanders could get what they needed.
sentences.korean: 안토니오 덕분에 섬사람들은 자신들이 필요한 것을 얻을 수 있었다.
sentences.author: 이재영

sentences.english: What the islanders here need is not tools or books, but cats.
sentences.korean: 여기 섬사람들에게 필요한 것은 도구나 책이 아니라 고양이다.
sentences.author: 이재영

syntax_chunks.eng: What the islanders here need is
not tools or books, but cats.

grammar_properties.target_pattern: What + S + V (not A but B)

sentences.english: The queen gave Antonio a chest that was filled with jewels.
sentences.korean: 여왕은 안토니오에게 보석으로 가득 찬 상자를 주었다.
sentences.author: 이재영

syntax_chunks.eng: chest that was filled with jewels.

sentences.english: That’s what I want to show you.
sentences.korean: 그것이 내가 당신에게 보여주고 싶은 것이다.
sentences.author: 이재영

sentences.english: I visited a local hospital last Sunday to help children.
sentences.korean: 나는 지난주 일요일에 아이들을 돕기 위해 지역 병원을 방문했습니다.
sentences.author: 이재영

sentences.english: While I was there, I saw some people helping each other.
sentences.korean: 그곳에 있는 동안, 나는 사람들이 서로 돕고 있는 것을 보았습니다.
sentences.author: 이재영

syntax_chunks.eng: saw some people helping each other.

sentences.english: That’s what I want to show you today.
sentences.korean: 그것이 오늘 내가 여러분께 보여드리고 싶은 것입니다.
sentences.author: 이재영

grammar_properties.target_pattern: to + V / that + S + V / N + that

sentences.english: When I arrived, the performance had already started.
sentences.korean: 내가 도착했을 때 공연은 이미 시작되어 있었다.
sentences.author: 이재영

sentences.english: Jake was late because he had missed the bus.
sentences.korean: 제이크는 버스를 놓쳤었기 때문에 늦었다.
sentences.author: 이재영

sentences.english: At the time, Korea was under Japanese rule.
sentences.korean: 그 당시 한국은 일본의 통치하에 있었습니다.
sentences.author: 이재영

grammar_properties.target_pattern: It was + N + that / had + p.p.

sentences.english: He was late for a meeting because he had missed the train.
sentences.korean: 그는 기차를 놓쳤었기 때문에 회의에 늦었습니다.
sentences.author: 이재영

syntax_chunks.eng: He was late for a meeting
because he had missed the train.

grammar_properties.target_pattern: It was + N + that / had + p.p.

sentences.korean: 안토니오는 궁전에 쥐들이 있는 것을 보고 매우 놀랐다.
sentences.author: 이재영

sentences.english: When Luigi opened the box, he was speechless. There was a kitten.
sentences.korean: 루이지가 상자를 열었을 때, 그는 할 말을 잃었다. 그 안에는 아기 고양이가 있었다.
sentences.author: 이재영

syntax_chunks.eng: When Luigi opened the box, he
syntax_chunks.kor: 루이지가 상자를 열었을 때, 그는 할

syntax_chunks.eng: was speechless. There was a kitten.
syntax_chunks.kor: 말을 잃었다. 그 안에는 아기 고양이가 있었다.

sentences.english: What makes you happy?
sentences.korean: 무엇이 여러분을 행복하게 하나요?
sentences.author: 이재영

sentences.english: Here are the results of our survey on the 100 students of our school.
sentences.korean: 여기 우리 학교 학생 100명을 대상으로 한 설문 조사 결과가 있습니다.
sentences.author: 이재영

syntax_chunks.eng: Here are the results of our survey
on the 100 students of our school.
syntax_chunks.kor: 대상으로 한 설문 조사 결과가 있습니다.

sentences.english: Most students said they feel happy when they are with their friends.
sentences.korean: 대부분의 학생은 친구들과 함께 있을 때 행복을 느낀다고 답했습니다.
sentences.author: 이재영

syntax_chunks.eng: Most students said they feel happy
when they are with their friends.

sentences.english: Why did you look so nervous yesterday?
sentences.korean: 어제 왜 그렇게 긴장한 것처럼 보였니?
sentences.author: 이재영

sentences.english: I was nervous because I had a big English test.
sentences.korean: 영어 큰 시험이 있어서 긴장했었어.
sentences.author: 이재영

sentences.english: But it’s over now, so I feel great!
sentences.korean: 하지만 이제 다 끝났어, 그래서 기분이 정말 좋아!
sentences.author: 이재영

sentences.english: ׮1 A That man looks just like Ben.
sentences.korean: ׮1 A 저 남자는 벤과 꼭 닮았어요.
sentences.author: 이재영

sentences.english: When dinner was served, rats appeared, and some servants chased them away with sticks.
sentences.korean: 저녁 식사가 나오자 쥐들이 나타났고, 일부 하인들은 막대기를 들고 쥐들을 쫓아냈습니다.
sentences.author: 이재영

syntax_chunks.eng: When dinner was served, rats appeared, and
some servants chased them away with sticks.
syntax_chunks.kor: 일부 하인들은 막대기를 들고 쥐들을 쫓아냈습니다.

sentences.english: “What amazing animals!” cried the queen when she saw all the rats run away.
sentences.korean: “정말 놀라운 동물이네요!” 여왕은 쥐들이 모두 도망가는 것을 보고 소리쳤어요.
sentences.author: 이재영

syntax_chunks.eng: “What amazing animals!” cried the queen when
she saw all the rats run away.

sentences.english: She gave Antonio a chest that was filled with jewels.
sentences.korean: 그녀는 안토니오에게 보석이 가득 담긴 상자를 선물했습니다.
sentences.author: 이재영

grammar_properties.target_pattern: be + p.p. / that + S + V / N + that
